name: Nadav Zafrir
background: Mr. Zafrir has served as Chairman of the Board since 2019. He is the co-founder and Managing Partner of Team8, a venture creation and venture capital fund. He previously served as the Commander of the Israel Defense Forces Unit 8200.

company_affiliations.name: SolarEdge Technologies, Inc.
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Member of the Board of Directors (formerly Chairman)

company_affiliations.name: Check Point Software Technologies Ltd.
company_affiliations.title_or_role: CEO and Member of the Board of Directors
